title: BoardGameGeek Hotness
content:
1. **The Lord of the Rings: The King's Gambit**
*None*
The climactic final battles in The Lord of The Rings come alive on a epic board.
![The Lord of the Rings: The King's Gambit](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-03-30/toplist/bgg_f7511049.jpg)

2. **Star Wars: The Queen's Gambit**
*2000*
Recreate the climactic scenes from Star Wars: Episode I - The Phantom Menace.
![Star Wars: The Queen's Gambit](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-03-30/toplist/bgg_e4ca8942.jpg)

3. **Brass: Pittsburgh**
*2027*
Take part in the United States' late 19th-century industrial boom.
![Brass: Pittsburgh](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-03-30/toplist/bgg_39a2023b.jpg)

4. **The Lord of the Rings: Fate of the Fellowship**
*2025*
As members of The Fellowship, embark on a journey to save—or doom—Middle-earth.
![The Lord of the Rings: Fate of the Fellowship](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-03-30/toplist/bgg_f7817b04.png)

5. **Brass: Birmingham**
*2018*
Build networks, grow industries, and navigate the world of the Industrial Revolution.
![Brass: Birmingham](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-03-30/toplist/bgg_e070bf0e.jpg)

6. **The Old King's Crown**
*2025*
Out-manoeuvre your rivals as you vie for control of an ancient, crumbling kingdom.
![The Old King's Crown](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-03-30/toplist/bgg_ef70752a.jpg)

7. **Nippon: Zaibatsu**
*2026*
Control conglomerates of companies driving Japan’s economy.
![Nippon: Zaibatsu](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-03-30/toplist/bgg_4863e614.jpg)

8. **Grimcoven**
*2025*
Boss battler game set in a dark Victorian universe.
![Grimcoven](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-03-30/toplist/bgg_1b098a31.png)

9. **Slay the Spire: The Board Game**
*2024*
Craft a unique deck, discover powerful relics, and Slay the Spire together!
![Slay the Spire: The Board Game](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-03-30/toplist/bgg_c9d395a1.png)

10. **SETI: Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence**
*2024*
Search for signs of alien life by launching probes and analyzing distant signals.
![SETI: Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-03-30/toplist/bgg_bd936154.jpg)

11. **Arcs**
*2024*
Rule the galaxy with your court, fleet, and cities.
![Arcs](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-03-30/toplist/bgg_ffe50f3a.png)

12. **Ark Nova**
*2021*
Plan and build a modern, scientifically managed zoo to support conservation projects.
![Ark Nova](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-03-30/toplist/bgg_2f4449ce.jpg)

13. **Heat: Pedal to the Metal**
*2022*
Push your car to the limit in the pursuit of victory, but don’t overheat!
![Heat: Pedal to the Metal](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-03-30/toplist/bgg_3ec71db8.jpg)

14. **Concordia: Special Edition**
*2027*
Merchants build and trade throughout the Roman Empire to please the Gods.
![Concordia: Special Edition](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-03-30/toplist/bgg_0281a6e3.jpg)

15. **Phantom Epoch**
*2025*
Travel the galaxy in the footsteps of the Vanished to defeat an ancient enemy.
![Phantom Epoch](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-03-30/toplist/bgg_061047d2.jpg)

16. **Voidfall**
*2023*
Repel the Voidborn and restore Domineum in this space themed, heavy Euro.
![Voidfall](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-03-30/toplist/bgg_9fe39824.jpg)

17. **Magical Athlete**
*2025*
Pit a cast of crazy characters against each other in a madcap race to the finish.
![Magical Athlete](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-03-30/toplist/bgg_68d04a9b.png)

18. **Harmonies**
*2024*
Create your own landscape and habitats to welcome animals.
![Harmonies](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-03-30/toplist/bgg_2a80b84f.jpg)

19. **Arkham Horror: The Card Game**
*2016*
Investigate the horrors of Arkham while courting cosmic doom.
![Arkham Horror: The Card Game](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-03-30/toplist/bgg_928fbc04.jpg)

20. **Spirit Island**
*2017*
Island Spirits join forces using elemental powers to defend their home from invaders.
![Spirit Island](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-03-30/toplist/bgg_74661263.jpg)

21. **Eternal Decks**
*2025*
Can you solve each stage before your deck runs out?
![Eternal Decks](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-03-30/toplist/bgg_a3b3a257.png)

22. **Terraforming Mars**
*2016*
Compete with rival CEOs to make Mars habitable and build your corporate empire.
![Terraforming Mars](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-03-30/toplist/bgg_ec2bd287.jpg)

23. **Dune: Imperium – Uprising**
*2023*
Deploy agents, build your deck, and engage in strategic battles to control Arrakis.
![Dune: Imperium – Uprising](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-03-30/toplist/bgg_2c2d1f52.jpg)

24. **Root**
*2018*
Decide the fate of the woodland as asymmetric factions fight for contrasting goals.
![Root](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-03-30/toplist/bgg_95e39f1a.jpg)

25. **Flip 7**
*2024*
Score the cards in front of you, or take another card, risking everything you hold?
![Flip 7](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-03-30/toplist/bgg_49af20b6.jpg)
author: boardgamegeek.com
